headline: Sabah and Sarawak MA63 rights review stalls on 21 items
context: The inter-governmental committee reviewing Malaysia Agreement 1963 implementation reported that 21 of 40 priority items remained unresolved as of 2025.

cards.big: 21 of 40 MA63 priority items unresolved 62 years after federation agreement
cards.sub: Sabah and Sarawak autonomy rights remain partially implemented

cards.big: MA63 guaranteed immigration, judicial, and financial autonomy to Borneo states
cards.sub: Constitutional amendments in 1976 reduced Sabah and Sarawak's special position

cards.big: 2021 constitutional amendment restored Sabah-Sarawak as equal federation partners
cards.sub: Symbolic recognition has not accelerated actual devolution of powers

cards.big: Oil and gas royalty dispute worth RM8.3 billion remains among 21 unresolved items
cards.sub: Revenue sharing directly affects development in both Borneo states

cards.big: 62 years of incomplete implementation means broken promises are the agreement's legacy
GPS and GRS coalition leaders raised MA63 in 4 parliamentary sessions in 2024
